text_editor_cta_button_use_touchpoint_de: Choose an existing Touchpoint destination to direct customer engagements back to the system
text_editor_cta_button_use_url_desc: Enter a URL here and direct the customer to an external location
text_editor_disable_unsubscribe: Only one opt-out paragraph is allowed in a newsletter
text_editor_variable_name_desc: The name will only be shown in the email content draft
text_editor_variable_data_source_desc: If the content of the selected field is empty, the variable in the sent email will be empty
text_editor_variable_board_empty: Please select an Audience as the content source board in the template settings first.
text_editor_variable_out_of_range: Selected field is no longer available. Please reselect another field as the source
upload_attach_files_modal_description: You can add up to {{max}} files per field. Each individual file size should be less than 5 MB.
upload_attach_files_modal_url_label: Enter the URL to photo file
upload_no_preview: No preview available. Try again later or download to view the file.
on_boarding_conversation_menu_title: Multi-channel inbox chatroom for your team members to engage at all channels
on_boarding_conversation_menu_desc: Centralize all your communication channels into one inbox including WhatsApp, Facebook Messenger, LINE, WeChat and Web Widgets, etc.
on_boarding_conversation_menu_tooltip: Our communication core. A multi-channel inbox for everything
on_boarding_conversation_page_title: Chatroom for your team members to engage
on_boarding_conversation_page_desc: See our sample chatroom with Jenny here. You can chat with your customers in chatrooms like this.
on_boarding_crm_menu_desc: Manage leads, sales, and customer relationships in one place. Track progress, optimize workflows, and gain insights for growth.
on_boarding_crm_menu_tooltip: Comprehensive CRM for lead, sales, customer management and more
on_boarding_knowledgeHub_menu_tooltip: Dynamic database for social management, cross-platform data connection, and transformation
on_boarding_crm_page_desc: All hers and newcomer's details saved under "Contacts". Engagements, sales order, CRM info all stored for better insights. 👍
on_boarding_databoards_menu_title: Social, lead engagements, and more data, all in one place
on_boarding_databoards_menu_desc: This is like your brains' long term memory. Can Easily configure, tag anything, forms, appointments from all channels and touchpoints.
on_boarding_databoards_menu_tooltip: Dynamic database for social management, cross-platform data connection, and transformation
on_boarding_databoards_page_title: Customer interactions and engagements are all captured here
on_boarding_databoards_page_desc: Consolidate social interactions from Facebook and Instagram, outbound engagements through Email and WhatsApp, and submissions from web forms, etc. Your data, centralized and ready for transformation, automation, and analysis.
on_boarding_channels_menu_title: CONNECT 360.  Roadmap to business growth for all your touchpoints
on_boarding_channels_menu_desc: Visualize your touchpoints in one place. Connect to get more insights for business growth. 🆙
on_boarding_channels_menu_tooltip: Consolidate all your channels and touchpoints to expand the potential
on_boarding_channels_page_title: Connect more channels and touchpoints to unlock business insights and potential
on_boarding_channels_page_desc: Centralize your communication channels, social engagements, physical interaction, and more in one place with connected insights that empower the team and the business.
on_boarding_help_center_menu_title: Have questions or can’t find what you need?
on_boarding_help_center_menu_desc: Check out the guides and tutorials here, or chat with our team about how we can better assist you with your needs.
on_boarding_journey_menu_title: Get inspired and explore the ready-to-install Journeys and Ideas
on_boarding_journey_menu_desc: Journeys help you and your team achieve your goal easier and faster. Can’t find the journeys you need? Browse ideas for inspiration. Still can’t find what you need, look out for new tool updates or submit a special request to us.
databoard_disabled_checkbox_tooltip: System-generated records cannot be selected to delete
